nodes.name: Schedule Trigger
nodes.notes: Runs every Monday 7am. Or trigger manually.

nodes.name: Merge Stats
nodes.notes: Run Once for All Items. Flags videos over 18 min or under 10 sec as skipVideo.

nodes.name: Gemini Vision Caption
nodes.notes: Calls Gemini 2.5 Flash with the YouTube URL directly. No download needed. Skips videos flagged as too long/short.

parameters.jsCode:
const raw = $input.item.json; const report = raw.analysis || 'Error: no response from model'; const weekOf = $('Aggregate').item.json.weekOf; const pdfConfig = `--- pdf_options: margin: top: 0 right: 0 bottom: 0 left: 0 format: A4 printBackground: true page_media_type: print --- `; const banner = `

CRASAS · CBHS 2976A

VEX V5 Push Back — Intelligence Report

Week of ${weekOf}

Generated by CBHS Robotics CRASAS V5 · Christchurch Boys' High School

`; const tocHTML = `

Contents

01Executive Summary

02Mechanism Analysis

03Autonomous Routine Trends

04Driver Control Tactics

05High-Value Teams and Channels

06Novelty Flags

07Recommended Watch List

08Meta Trajectory

`; const bodyWithoutToc = report.replace(/##\s*Contents[\s\S]*?(?=\n##\s)/i, ''); const cleanedBody = bodyWithoutToc.replace(/^(#{1,3})\s+\d+\.\s+/gm, '$1 '); return [{ json: { report: pdfConfig + banner + tocHTML + cleanedBody + '\n\n
', weekOf, filename: `CRASAS_REPORT--${weekOf}.md` } }];
